Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

While executing CSIT found 2 changes that need to be pushed into this commit :

1. CSIT unable to pull "nexus3.onap.org:10003/onap/ncmp-dmi-plugin:1.2.0-SNAPSHOT-latest" (Optional : As discussed with priyank it would be ggod to modify this for consistency)

Need to update docker compose file (docker-compose/docker-compose.yml:21) as there is diff. dmi version into pom.xml (<tag>1.3.0-SNAPSHOT-latest</tag>) and docker compose image: ${DOCKER_REPO:-nexus3.onap.org:10003}/onap/ncmp-dmi-plugin:${DMI_VERSION:-1.2.0-SNAPSHOT-latest}).

2. Need to update env variable "LOCAL_IP" (Mandatory : currently LOCAL_IP is set to empty that causing CSIT failure)

Current value : $(ip -4 addr show docker0 | grep -Po 'inet \K[\d.]+')
Updated value : $((ip -4 addr show docker0 | grep -Po 'inet \K[\d.]+') || hostname -I | awk '{print $1}')

FYI :Toine, Priyank , Joe
